query: SELECT configKey, SUBSTRING(configValue, 1, 40) as val_preview, LENGTH(configValue) as val_len FROM platform_config WHERE configKey LIKE '%stripe%' OR configKey LIKE '%STRIPE%' OR configKey LIKE '%webhook%' OR configKey LIKE '%WEBHOOK%'
